action.reasoning: Observation: Eval failed because predict.py hardcodes '/data/base_model/Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct' which doesn't exist in eval container. Analysis: In eval container, /data is the test data dir, not training data. Model must be loaded from workspace/checkpoints. Decision: 1) Copy base model to checkpoints dir, 2) Fix predict.py to load from checkpoint arg, 3) Start LoRA fine-tuning, 4) Submit eval with fixed predict.py.
